const state = $('Resolve Wekan Context').first().json;
return [{ json: { result: state.validationMessage || 'The Wekan request could not be executed.', confirmationRequired: false } }];

const state = $('Resolve Wekan Context').first().json;
return [{ json: { result: 'The action ' + state.actionKey + ' is not supported by the Wekan helper yet.', confirmationRequired: false } }];
